text_block_list.text:
An injured Stay Gold was 
taken to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't hurt all that much, 
it's nothing serious.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: I'll rest a little, then head back to training.
choice_data_list: No no, being careless is wrong

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
It's fine. I get plenty of injuries 
like this when I'm travelling.
choice_data_list: No no no, I can't let you do this…!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
You won't let me huh. Even if that's 
the case, I kinda want to go for a run 
right now.

Her way of talking made me hesitate for a 
moment. She's like a kid who won't take 
no for an answer and go run anyway…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Hey, am I realllllly not allowed to 
go train? ……I'm begging you.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Can't help it. I'll behave and rest 
today, because you're the one 
who is in charge of me.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
That's right, going for a stroll should 
be fine right? If I could just go 
outside for a bit…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
That's strict. Then I guess I'll go for a nap 
on the rooftop, in my trusty hammock of 
course.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Aah～…As I thought, it's kind of serious…… It's hurting a lot more now……

It appears that suddenly moving made 
Stay Gold's injury worse. We will have 
to give up on training this time.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I feel completely fine. So long 
I pace myself, I'm going to do this!

Just like that, we successfully completed 
a light training session!
